description_long: This object consists of two matching bar stools, each featuring a round, cushioned seat upholstered in a deep red material. The seats are supported by sturdy, black metal frames with four tubular legs that flare outward for stability. Each stool includes a circular footrest ring connecting the legs, providing additional support and a place to rest one's feet. The seat edges are ribbed, adding a subtle visual detail to the otherwise simple design. The stools have no backrests, making them compact and easy to tuck under counters or tables. Their industrial look and durable construction make them suitable for urban environments such as bars, garages, or public gathering spaces.
description: A pair of industrial-style bar stools with round red cushioned seats and black metal frames, featuring circular footrests and no backrests.
description_view_0: Two stools are shown side by side, highlighting the round red seats and the black metal legs with footrest rings.
description_view_1: The stools are aligned front to back, emphasizing the depth of the seats and the circular footrest structure.
description_view_2: A top-down angle shows the symmetry of the seats and the even spacing of the legs and footrests.
description_view_3: The stools are again aligned front to back, with a clear view of the seat tops and the supporting leg structure.
